notes: Born 1585 in Tewksbury, Gloucestershire, England. Parents: William Tuxbury Tewksbury (1565-1620, West Hatch, Somerset) and Sarah Bulman Tewksbury (1565-1621, West Hatch, Somerset). Arrived in Boston, Massachusetts in 1620 — the same year as the Mayflower. Both parents died in England in 1620-1621. Married Alice Brewse. Son Henry Tewksbury born 1621 in Greenwich, Kent, England. Died 1621 in Kent, England at age 36 — the same year his son was born. Buried July 8, 1660 at North Cheriton, Somerset (reburial?). The surname comes from the town of Tewksbury (Tewkesbury) in Gloucestershire.
